artifacts.redacted_summary: A reusable review skill was installed successfully using the supported package-manager workflow after an unsupported plugin-style command failed. Verification signal was a successful install exit status, and the skill became available to the agent runtime. A separate document-generation request did not complete because interactive authorization=[REDACTED] out. A recurring recovery-check task was observed to be idempotent and silent when a prior notification had already been sent.
